subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! This is Thy servant who hath turned toward the Dayspring of Thy mercifulness and directed himself unto the Kingdom of Thy oneness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هذا عبدک الذی اقبل الی مطلع رحمانیتک و توجه الی ملکوت فردانیتک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @spiritual transformation, @prayer for the departed, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
